title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 263.180 - Penalty
text:
263.180.  Penalty. — Any person who shall violate any provision or requirement of sections 263.010 to 263.180, or who shall forge, counterfeit, deface, destroy, or wrongfully use any certificate provided for in sections 263.010 to 263.180, shall be deemed guilty of a class A misdemeanor.
(RSMo 1939 § 14049, A.L. 1984 S.B. 516) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 12382 
Effective 1-01-85
